purpose: The Shavei Zion–Bustan HaGalil Marine Reserve is intended to protect a rare sequence of rocky marine habitats formed on kurkar ridges, ranging from coastal abrasion platforms to a deep offshore reef at 45 meters depth. These habitats support diverse and densely populated benthic communities, including territorial and pelagic fish, and contribute significantly to the ecological health of the broader marine system.
restrictions:
The Shavei Zion–Bustan HaGalil Marine Reserve is currently a proposed reserve and has not yet been officially declared. The following restrictions apply to Marine Nature Reserves and will go into effect when this protected area is officially decalred.
1. No person shall carry out any action which constitutes or which might constitute damage to the nature reserve, other than with a written permit from the Director, including eradication, destruction, demolition, breaking, sabotage, writing, drawing or engraving on the land, placement of a signboard, causing damage to or bothering an animal, grazing, cutting, plucking, removal, alteration of shape or natural position of animals, vegetation or abiotic objects, or interference with their reproduction and continuation of their natural development, changing the face of the land, including excavation, erection of a structure or installation, or introduction of extraneous material, as well as the dumping of waste or leaving it.
2. Persons may not damage, destroy, pick, uproot, poison or otherwise change a protected natural asset except with the permission of the Director of the Nature Reserves Authority.
3. Selling protected natural assets is prohibited except with the permission of the Nature Reserves Authority. A person may not own a protected natural asset unless he receives permission from the Nature Reserves Authority.
4. Fishing within marine nature reserves is prohibited, unless otherwise stated.
allowed: Certain activities may be permitted subject to all applicable laws.
regulation_name: National Parks, Nature Reserves, National Sites and Memorial Sites Law -1998; National Parks, Nature Reserves, National Sites and Memorial Sites Proclamation (Protected Natural Assets), 5765-2005
report_violations: In case of damage to the reserve or protected assets, please call the Israel Nature and Parks Authority information line: *3639. Reports may be sent by email to: MARINE@NPA.ORG.IL
